assessment.note: Names a specific absence — substantive feedback on key decisions — which signals strain and mild disengagement; also suggests a clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Decision feedback
new_queue.name: On key decisions, what feedback are you not getting that would help most?
new_queue.description: Drills into the missing feedback thread to surface the specific gap and what better support would look like.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would be most useful from me over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Opens the door for air cover, unblocking, or decision support in a concrete way.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by steering toward practical changes that reduce load without introducing new topics.
